zh.Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Wales: 威爾士卡迪甘史爾卡洛-可-可拉德
zh.Dynevor Castle, Llandilo, Carmarthenshir: 威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd II ap Rhys於1157年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾時，他的父親Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales34歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis26歲。他於1189年與Matilda de Braose結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1197年登記服兵役。他去世於1201年7月25日在威爾士享年44歲，埋葬在威爾士卡迪甘史爾卡洛-可-可拉德。

zh-hans.Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Wales: 威尔士卡迪甘史爾卡洛-可-可拉德
zh-hans.Dynevor Castle, Llandilo, Carmarthenshir: 威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd II ap Rhys于1157年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾时，他的父亲Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales34岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis26岁。他于1189年与Matilda de Braose结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1197年登记服兵役。他去世于1201年7月25日在威尔士享年44岁，埋葬在威尔士卡迪甘史爾卡洛-可-可拉德。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd II ap Rhys was born in 1157, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, was 34 and his mother, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, was 26. He married Matilda de Braose in 1189. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1197. He died on 25 July 1201, in Wales, at the age of 44, and was buried in Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd II ap Rhys est né en 1157, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Braose en 1189. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1197. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1201, à Galles, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd II ap Rhys 1157 in Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales 34 und seine Mutter Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis 26. Er hat 1189 Matilda de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1197 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 25. Juli 1201 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Wales und wurde in Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd II ap Rhys è nato il nel 1157 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Braose nel 1189. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1197. Morì il 25 luglio 1201, nel Galles, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Galles.

ja.Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Wales: ウェールズカーディガンシュアイアカーオン-ウウチ-クラウッド
ja.Pebidiog, Pembrokeshire, Wales: ウェールズペンブロケシュアイア
ja.Carmarthenshire, Wales: ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイア
ja.Dynevor Castle, Llandilo, Carmarthenshir: ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd II ap Rhysが1157年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Walesは34歳，母Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powisは26歳であった。1189年にMatilda de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1197年に兵役登録をした。彼は1201年7月25日にウェールズで44歳で死去し，ウェールズカーディガンシュアイアカーオン-ウウチ-クラウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd II ap Rhys(이)가 1157년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1189년 Matilda de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1197년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1201년 7월 25일 웨일스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카디건실르 캐론-wch-클로드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd II ap Rhys nasceu em 1157, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Braose em 1189. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1197. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1201, em Gales, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd II ap Rhys родился в 1157 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Braose в 1189 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1197 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 25 июля 1201 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности карон-увч-клавдд, кардиганьшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd II ap Rhys nació en 1157, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Matilda de Braose en 1189. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1197. Murió el 25 de julio de 1201, en Gales, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Gales.
